name: Cboe Global Markets, Inc.
business: Cboe Global Markets operates a network of derivatives and securities exchanges, offering trading and clearing services in options, futures, equities, and foreign exchange. It serves financial institutions, broker-dealers, and individual investors across North America, Europe, and Asia Pacific. The company generates revenue from transaction and clearing fees, market data and access fees, and index licensing.

exposures.sentence: Cboe Clear U.S. is a CFTC-registered derivatives clearing organization (DCO) that provides clearing and settlement for a number of CFE products, including financially settled and continuous futures on Bitcoin and Ether.

We are currently utilizing certain technologies, such as artificial intelligence (AI) and the cloud, in limited capacities, including using AI to improve internal processes such as code development, documentation, and operational efficiency

The technology upon which we rely, including that of our service providers, may be susceptible to security vulnerabilities or breaches that could harm our business and our role in the global marketplace puts us at heightened risk relative to other public companies.
we continue to explore the potential use of other new technologies, such as... quantum computing

We utilize third-party cloud service providers to maintain secondary offsite backups of our and our customers' data and to distribute real-time data, and we may utilize third-party cloud service providers in the future for additional services.
we continue to explore the potential use of other new technologies, such as... blockchain

catalysts.event: Completion of migration of Bitcoin and Ether futures from Cboe Digital Exchange to CFE
catalysts.sentence: On June 9, 2025, Cboe successfully completed the migration of cash-settled Bitcoin and Ether futures contracts from Cboe Digital Exchange to CFE.

catalysts.event: Appointment of Craig S. Donohue as CEO effective May 7, 2025
catalysts.sentence: On May 1, 2025, the Company announced that its Board of Directors appointed longtime global financial markets executive, Craig S. Donohue, as the Company's new Chief Executive Officer and a member of the Board, effective May 7, 2025.

catalysts.event: Appointment of Robert A. Hocking as Global Head of Derivatives and Brian McElligott as Global Head of Cboe Data Vantage
catalysts.sentence: On September 30, 2025, the Company announced the appointment of two industry veterans to lead its Derivatives and Data Vantage businesses. Effective October 1, 2025, Robert A. Hocking rejoined as Executive Vice President, Global Head of Derivatives, and Brian McElligott joined as Senior Vice President, Global Head of Cboe Data Vantage.

catalysts.event: Appointment of Scott Johnston as COO effective March 6, 2026
catalysts.sentence: Subsequent to December 31, 2025, on January 26, 2026, the Company announced the planned appointments of Scott Johnston as Executive Vice President, Chief Operating Officer... who is retiring from his role effective March 6, 2026.
Rule 605 is expected to be implemented in August 2026

catalysts.event: Implementation of SEC Tick Size/Access Fee Cap proposals
catalysts.sentence: Tick Size/Access Fee Cap proposals are expected to be implemented in November 2026

catalysts.event: EU ban on payment for order flow effective
catalysts.sentence: ban on payment for order flow (effective June 30, 2026)
